description:
The LifetimeRangeInitializer component makes particles in a particle system start with a random lifetime/duration within a range.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.MinValue: The minimum lifetime a particle can start with.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum lifetime a particle can start with.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
